svg.title: Context-Forge redesigned context schema
svg.desc: Four-layer hierarchy: Version meta at top, Project intelligence, Folder context, File context at bottom, with cross-cutting concerns on the right

g.text: intent · breaking changes · migration notes · parent diff summary
data flow map · known footguns · tech decisions + rationale
what changed · why it changed · what it breaks · migration path
files touched · functions added/removed · decisions made
LLM context assembly (what gets injected per task)
global invariants + owning folder contract + file contract + dependency edges
+ relevant changelog entries + cross-cutting rules that apply
→ token-efficient, no noise, agent knows exactly what it can and cannot touch
